subcodes.first_line: In this day the Call is raised from every direction, and the Light of the Cause is dawning from the horizon of the heaven of imprisonment, and the ocean of utterance is manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز ندا از جمیع جهات مرتفع و نور امر از افق سماء سجن مشرق و لائح بحر بیان
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @contention and conflict, @spiritual transformation, @chastisement and requital
